div.p: Critical Invariant: A buffer in the SUBMITTED state is owned by the kernel. Userspace access during this window results in non-deterministic memory corruption.

ol.li: T1: App logic error calls release(X) while kernel is reading.
T2: Thread B acquires buf[X] and writes sensitive data.
T3: Kernel completes hardware DMA, overwriting Thread B's memory.

div.p: Result: Data corruption that never triggers a crash, only invalid state.

p.em: DMA ownership is atomic. Handover only occurs via CQE visibility.
